description: Contract: Microsoft webhook ingress builds pointer-only queue job payload with required tenant/provider/message identifiers
Contract: Google webhook ingress builds pointer-only queue job payload with required tenant/provider/history identifiers
Contract: IMAP listener ingress builds pointer-only queue job payload with required tenant/provider/mailbox pointer identifiers
Ingress behavior: Microsoft callback returns success only after durable enqueue succeeds
Ingress behavior: Google callback returns success only after durable enqueue succeeds
Ingress behavior: IMAP listener records success only after durable enqueue succeeds
Failure path: enqueue error returns non-2xx response in webhook ingress paths
Integration: IMAP delivery retries when server ingress returns non-2xx
Consumer: worker can claim and process queued Microsoft pointer jobs
Consumer: worker can claim and process queued Google pointer jobs
Consumer: worker can claim and process queued IMAP pointer jobs
Consumer fetch: Microsoft pointer resolves to full email payload before processing
Consumer fetch: Google pointer resolves to full email payload before processing
Consumer fetch: IMAP pointer resolves to full email payload before processing
Idempotency: first consume of message identity processes successfully and records consume marker
Idempotency: duplicate consume of same message identity no-ops downstream processing
Consumer execution: successful fetch invokes processInboundEmailInApp with full normalized email payload
Queue semantics: successful processing ACKs job and removes it from pending state
Queue semantics: processing failure does not ACK job and job is eligible for retry
Queue semantics: unacknowledged job resurfaces after claim timeout and is reprocessed
Retry policy: attempt count increments on each failed consume
Retry policy: job moves to DLQ when max attempts are exceeded
Source drift handling: IMAP message unavailable at consume time is marked skipped with deterministic reason
Source drift handling: skipped-source-unavailable path does not cause infinite retries
Payload guard: queue job payload schema excludes attachment bytes and raw MIME fields
Regression: legacy IMAP in-memory queue path is not used when unified queue mode is enabled
Security: Microsoft webhook validation/auth behavior remains enforced in enqueue-only mode
Security: Google webhook JWT verification remains enforced in enqueue-only mode
Security: IMAP webhook secret verification remains enforced in enqueue-only mode
Config: unified queue feature flag switches callbacks/listener to enqueue-only path
Config: disabling unified queue flag preserves previous behavior for controlled rollback
Logs: enqueue success/failure events include tenant/provider/pointer identifiers
Logs: consumer retry, ack, skip, and DLQ events include attempt counts and terminal reason
DB integration happy path: consume-time idempotency record is persisted for newly processed message
DB integration guard path: duplicate consume attempt is blocked by idempotency persistence constraint/check
E2E: Microsoft callback enqueues pointer and worker creates expected ticket/comment/documents through shared processing path
E2E: Google callback enqueues pointer and worker creates expected ticket/comment/documents through shared processing path
E2E: IMAP listener enqueues pointer and worker creates expected ticket/comment/documents through shared processing path
E2E: duplicate provider deliveries produce only one processed message outcome due to consume-time idempotency
Docs: scratchpad/runbook captures queue architecture, flags, and local validation steps
